_comment_dependencies: Dependency versions below are pinned for CVE mitigation. When upgrading, verify these versions still address current CVEs:
_comment_netty: netty.version=4.2.13.Final addresses CVE-2026-33870, CVE-2026-33871, CVE-2026-41417, CVE-2025-67735, GHSA-cm33, GHSA-57rv, GHSA-rwm7, GHSA-mj4r, GHSA-f6hv, GHSA-38f8, GHSA-xxqh, GHSA-m4cv and related Netty vulnerabilities
_comment_vertx: vertx.version=4.5.24 addresses CVE-2026-1002 and CVE-2026-6860 (Vert.x TLS wildcard SNI bypass)
_comment_commons_lang3: commons-lang3.version=3.18.0 addresses CVE-2024-47554 in Apache Commons Lang
_comment_jackson: jackson-bom.version=2.21.1 addresses GHSA-72hv-8253-57qq in jackson-core async JSON parser bypassing maxNumberLength (DoS via memory/CPU exhaustion)
_comment_spring_boot: spring-boot.version=3.5.14 addresses CVE-2026-40973 (ApplicationTemp predictable directory hijack). Must stay in 3.5.x lineage to match PBS-Java 3.43.0 parent pom.
_comment_security: GIT_TAG_VERSION=3.43.0 includes GHSA-4p3g-4hcj-wpvx fix (bidder adapter hostname forgery, Critical 10.0 CVSS) via PR #4522
